title: Zeptalytic parent-site DB foundation
description: First database-focused workstream for the Zeptalytic website backend / parent site repo. Build the launch-critical parent-owned schema foundation without duplicating Pay billing truth.

items.description: Inventory the current repo reality for DB/bootstrap/model/Alembic/test surfaces, confirm the authoritative commands and current topology, and validate or create the parent DB schema plan doc from the controlling architecture docs.
steps: Search the repo for existing DB/bootstrap/model/Alembic wiring before changing anything.
Summarize what already exists: app/bootstrap/config, SQLAlchemy model registration, Alembic env wiring, docker migration path, and test harness surfaces.
Validate that the schema plan doc matches the current ownership docs; refine it if repo reality requires changes.
Record any command or topology drift in IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md or the schema plan doc.
Append a durable progress entry at EOF.
pass_criteria: Repo discovery summary is recorded in progress/progress.txt.
Zeptalytic_Parent_DB_Schema_Plan.md exists and is aligned to the controlling docs.
Any authoritative command or topology drift is captured in docs.
Authoritative docker test command has been run successfully or a valid blocker recorded.

items.description: Add or align shared parent-repo DB bootstrap surfaces so later table slices have a consistent model-registration and migration path.
steps: Use repo search to identify current DB session/base/model import patterns and Alembic metadata loading.
Implement the smallest safe bootstrap alignment needed for the parent repo.
Avoid introducing endpoint logic or unrelated app behavior in this slice.
Add or update focused tests if the repo already has DB bootstrap test patterns.
Run the authoritative docker suite and update durable artifacts.
pass_criteria: There is one clear model-registration / Alembic path for the parent repo.
Changes are narrow and limited to DB/bootstrap foundations.
Focused tests and the authoritative docker suite pass.

items.description: Implement launch-critical identity/auth tables and migrations for the parent site.
steps: Implement accounts/auth/security models and migrations per the schema plan.
Register models so Alembic sees them.
Add focused tests for constraints and expected persistence behavior.
Run the authoritative docker suite and update durable artifacts.
pass_criteria: Identity/auth tables from the schema plan exist in models and migrations.
Focused tests exist and pass.
Authoritative docker suite passes.

items.description: Implement profile/settings/integration tables and migrations for the parent site.
steps: Implement profiles, preferences, communication preferences, and oauth/integration tables per the schema plan.
Add focused tests for uniqueness and relationship rules where relevant.
Run the authoritative docker suite and update durable artifacts.
pass_criteria: Profile/settings/integration tables are present in models and migrations.
Focused tests and docker suite pass.

items.description: Implement the parent-owned international-ready addresses table and migration.
steps: Implement addresses table exactly as an international-ready parent-owned model.
Do not overfit the schema to a single address provider or US-only format.
Add focused tests and run the docker suite.
pass_criteria: Addresses model and migration exist.
Schema is international-ready and parent-owned.
Focused tests and docker suite pass.

items.description: Implement support ticket, message, and attachment-metadata tables and migrations.
steps: Implement support tables per the schema plan.
Keep file storage out of Postgres; store attachment metadata only.
Add focused tests and run the docker suite.
pass_criteria: Support tables exist in models and migrations.
Attachment handling is metadata-only in DB design.
Focused tests and docker suite pass.

items.description: Implement announcements and service-status tables and migrations.
steps: Implement announcements and service_statuses tables per the schema plan.
Add focused tests and run the docker suite.
pass_criteria: Announcement/status tables exist in models and migrations.
Focused tests and docker suite pass.

items.description: Implement Pay-derived parent read-model tables for subscription/access/payment summaries without duplicating Pay commercial truth.
steps: Implement the projection/read-model tables named in the schema plan.
Keep naming and semantics summary/projection-focused, not authoritative billing truth.
Add focused tests and run the docker suite.
pass_criteria: Projection tables exist in models and migrations.
No duplicated Pay billing engine logic is introduced.
Focused tests and docker suite pass.

items.description: Align README/docs with actual DB topology, migration commands, and model-registration behavior once the schema foundation is in place.
steps: Document actual migration/bootstrap commands and topology once verified in repo reality.
Record any drift discovered during DB implementation.
Run the docker suite and update durable artifacts.
pass_criteria: Repo docs reflect actual DB topology and commands.
Docker suite passes.

items.description: Run and confirm the authoritative docker test suite as the final quality gate for the parent DB foundation workstream.
steps: Run the authoritative full docker suite as a standalone final quality step.
Record the exact command and result.
Mark the spec and plan complete only after the suite is green.
pass_criteria: Authoritative docker suite passes.
Spec and plan quality-gate markers are updated.
Progress log records the result.
